positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial pattern featuring a stylized crescent moon intertwined with blooming floral mandalas and gentle constellations. The composition must be centered and balanced, forming a repeating pattern perfect for fabric print. Utilize a limited color palette of deep indigo, gold leaf, cream, and soft teal. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets celestial tattoo flash. The image must have strong, crisp outlines and clean silhouettes, utilizing high contrast between the light-colored elements and the deep background. Artwork should evoke a sense of calm wonder and timeless magic. Graphic illustration style, vector art, highly detailed linework, isolated on a solid background for printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, grainy, dirty, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grayscale, photographic, realistic, deep focus
